violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the area between the griddle and cold drawer has an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The door to the outside, located in the ware-washing room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
The food prep sink was observed with an air-break. The food prep sink must have a proper air-gap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
